channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: The local election that could topple Britain’s prime minister
item.dc:creator: Steve Hendrix
item.description: The outcome of a special election in the small working-class district of Makerfield has the potential to upend Labour Party leadership and U.K. politics.

item.title: Senate targets Hegseth’s travel in standoff over apparent Iran school attack, boat strikes
item.dc:creator: Tara Copp, Noah Robertson
item.description: Frustrated lawmakers are increasing pressure on the defense secretary to get answers they’ve sought for months.

item.title: Russia’s war in Ukraine comes back into Trump’s focus with no end in sight
item.dc:creator: Mary Ilyushina
item.description: The president met with Ukraine’s Volodymyr Zelensky at the G-7 summit but told reporters the conflict “has no impact on us … we’re thousands of miles away.”
